nasb.text: Then you shall bring it to your father, that he may eat, so that he may bless you before his death.”

esv.text: And you shall bring it to your father to eat, so that he may bless you before he dies.”

cnv.text: 然後你要拿去給你父親吃，好讓他在未死以前給你祝福。”

ccb.text: 由你拿去给他吃，让他死前为你祝福。”

csbs.text: 然后你拿去给你父亲吃，好让他在死之前祝福你。”
